{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322070517E5C39991A341485AF8AF"}"},"total":814},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7410783505820484414","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看呜呜呜呜呜呜😭😭，明明知道新生代们是在演戏、有剧本、不是真实发生的，但就是心疼他们，眼泪一个劲流啊呜呜呜呜呜呜呜呜呜😭😭，太伤心了，作者是知道怎么赚我们眼泪的"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1725460333,"group_id":"7404709116926512153","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"读书破万卷，下笔如有神","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4Nbw4P4NXz3qkMX9BPH+spHbPEl1fMXtwDLEaFthjWx","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1541977924180036","user_name":"音琳琳"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1541977924180036","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7404709116926512153","book_info":{"abstract":"在艾瑞亚和赛罗与新生代们团建时，突如其来的任务出现在艾瑞亚和赛罗手中，那是来自于另一个大宇宙的求救。
在那个大宇宙中光暗严重失衡，宇宙濒临崩溃，于是他们一合计，正好最近没事干。
于是，新生代和赛罗、艾瑞亚的扮演反派任务正在进行中……
（有白托、白贝
CP：凯伽，泰托……
